overall.description: Gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game showing an armored character navigating a dark industrial space facility. The clip begins with a holographic video call on a wrist device, then follows the character through hydroponics laboratories and industrial stairwells, ending with a door interaction to enter a new section.

scene_state.functional_zone: private quarters with holographic communication interface

events.description: character on wrist screen holds up a colorful plant specimen for display
holographic wrist device powers down, screen goes dark

agents.ego_description: standing still, viewing a holographic video call on wrist-mounted device

notable_agents.action: woman on video call presenting a plant specimen and speaking

entered.detail: curved transparent screen mounted on forearm displaying video feed
heavy segmented protective gloves holding the wrist device steady

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a close-up of a futuristic wrist device displaying a holographic video call. A woman on the screen presents a colorful plant specimen while the camera holder remains stationary in a dimly lit private quarters. The device powers down at the end of the call, transitioning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office quarters with storage and exit door

events.description: character opens a metal storage drawer and retrieves an item
character exits the room through a sliding metal door into a corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through personal quarters, interacting with storage, then exiting the room

entered.detail: tall shelving unit containing books and storage containers
wall-mounted board with technical diagrams and notes
sliding metal drawer that opens to reveal contents
heavy metal door with electronic control panel

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to third-person view showing a character in an armored suit within a dimly lit room. The character opens a storage drawer, then walks toward and exits through a metal door into a facility corridor, leaving the private quarters behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hydroponics laboratory with plant cultivation systems

events.description: entering hydroponics lab with bright green grow lights illuminating plant specimens
exiting the hydroponics lab through a heavy security door

agents.ego_description: walking through facility corridors and passing through a hydroponics laboratory with plant specimens

entered.detail: narrow passage with yellow emergency lighting and metal walls
tall glass enclosures with illuminated green plants inside
white counter with scientific equipment and tools
heavy reinforced door with warning labels and control panel

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor with yellow lighting before entering a hydroponics laboratory filled with glowing green plant growth chambers. The environment features scientific workbenches and glass enclosures as the character proceeds toward a security door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance stairwell with multiple levels

events.description: character begins ascending the metal staircase to upper levels
approaching upper level with illuminated signage visible above door

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of metal stairs in an industrial shaft with piping and railings

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with yellow safety markings on steps
metal guardrails along the edges of stairs and platforms
large metal conduits and ventilation ducts on walls
heavy industrial door with 'GREENHOUSE' signage and warning labels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tall industrial stairwell with metal steps and safety railings, ascending multiple levels past exposed piping and ventilation systems. The environment is dimly lit with industrial lighting as the character climbs toward a heavy airlock door marked 'GREENHOUSE' at the top level.

events.description: character interacts with door control panel to unlock the greenhouse airlock
heavy airlock door opens revealing brightly lit interior corridor

agents.ego_description: operating a door control panel and entering the greenhouse section through the opening airlock

entered.detail: wall-mounted electronic interface with buttons and status display
corridor visible through the opening door with warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the greenhouse airlock and interacts with a control panel on the right wall. After authentication, the heavy metal door slides open with a hiss, revealing a brightly lit corridor beyond. The character proceeds through the doorway into the new section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an intimate holographic interaction in a private room to a journey through a sterile, glowing industrial laboratory. It begins with a close-up of a futuristic wrist device displaying a holographic video call in a dimly lit space, which then powers down into darkness. As the camera pulls back into a third-person perspective, the armored character opens a storage drawer before exiting the private quarters through a heavy metal door. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor bathed in yellow light, leading the character forward into a hydroponics laboratory filled with glowing green plant growth chambers and scientific workbenches. The movement finally proceeds through the glass enclosures of the lab toward a security door at the far end of the facility.

The shot follows a continuous ascent through a dim industrial stairwell that culminates in the entry to a brightly lit facility section. It begins with the character climbing multiple levels of metal steps, moving past exposed piping and ventilation systems under muted industrial lighting. As the character reaches the top level, the camera approaches a heavy airlock door marked Greenhouse. The scene then shifts as the character interacts with a wall-mounted control panel, causing the metal door to slide open with a hiss. Finally, the camera follows the character through the threshold, transitioning from the dark stairwell into the brilliant light of the corridor beyond.
